title: Very Normal-mon
description: A chill and lightweight cobblemon modpack whilst still containing most of the interesting features!
body:
![Mod's banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/156b9cebe70e59f5cc34cc8453b1027c4992af3d_0.webp)

What is this Modpack about?

> This is a light modpack to play cobblemon, made due to me and one of my friends not finding a cobblemon modpack that we liked, be it too big for what we wanted to do or adding features we didn't want... > Important note though, the modpack is meant to be used by me and some friends on an SMP so even if I try making it as stable and coherent as possible, **some mods may not be to everyone's liking in a normal world** I tried my best to make it feels like minecraft and cobblemon though so hopefully it will be to most people's liking. > Great for players who enjoy vanilla-ish packs + Cobblemon! > Just a heads-up: this modpack isn’t meant to be complex no questlines or any custom content. *What version is this on?* - **1.21.1 Fabric**

Mods list

Mods in version 1.3 - [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/jtmvUHXj) by Blodhgarm, chyzman, Dr\.Zeal - [Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/ulloLmqG) by Starfish Studios, Crispytwig, Synthestra -
